name: Baked Vanilla Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and salt into a large bowl. Using a pastry blender or 2 knives, cut in butter until evenly distributed and mixture resembles breadcrumbs. With a fork, lightly mix in sugar, egg, and enough ice water to make a dough.
2. Press the dough into a ball and wrap in foil or plastic wrap. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F.
4. On a floured surface, roll out dough to fit a 10-inch Flan tin with a removable bottom. Place dough in tin without stretching.
5. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese, oil, sugar, egg yolks, cornstarch, vanilla extract, and milk until smooth.
6. Beat egg whites until stiff; fold into cream cheese mixture.
7. Pour the filling into pastry shell.
8. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in center comes out clean. Turn off oven.
9. Let cheesecake cool in oven with door open slightly. Remove cooled cheesecake from tin and serve.
